body_errors.note: Printed text reads βλάπτοντες in XVIII 2.

apparatus_errors.note: Apparatus has εἱρκτῇ with accent on eta, not plain eta-iota form without accent.
Printed apparatus reads ἐρημίας with accent.
Printed apparatus reads δυσάλυκτον with accent.
Printed apparatus reads συρίζον with accent.
Printed apparatus reads ἀμφιλαφεῖς with accents/breathing.
Printed apparatus reads ὀρνέων with breathing/accent.
Printed apparatus reads ζῴων with diaeresis/accent.
Printed apparatus reads ἀπηνεστάτων with accent/breathing.
Printed apparatus reads θηρίων with accent.
Printed apparatus reads παρέλυσεν with accent.
Printed apparatus reads ἐκφοβοῦντα with accents.
Printed apparatus reads ἐκείνοις with accent.
Printed apparatus reads αὐτοὺς in the lemma, not αὐτοῖς.
Printed apparatus reads αὐτοὺς in the variant note, not αὐτοῦ.
Printed apparatus reads ὧν with accent.
Printed apparatus reads φωνὴν with accent.
Printed apparatus lemma is βλάπτοντες, matching body; transcript has wrong form.
Printed apparatus reads εὐχαριστοῦσιν, not εὐχαριστοῦν.
Printed apparatus reads ἐδέοντο with accent.
Printed apparatus reads ὁδηγὸν with breathing/accent.
Printed apparatus reads φιλοτίμου with accent.
Printed apparatus reads ξενιτείας with accent.
Printed apparatus reads παρέσχες with accent.
Printed apparatus reads ἐκείνων, not ἐκείνου.
Printed apparatus reads σκότει with accent.

note: Body is very accurate aside from one clear word-form error, but the apparatus transcription is not sign-off quality due to many confirmed mismatches and loss of polytonic detail.
